content.full_text:
FPPC
Apr 4 9 21 PM '90

Fair Political Practices Comm          Fairfield Calif
428 "J" Street Ste 800                31 Mar 1990
Sacramento Calif
95814

Legal Dept:

Does this Resolution (81-262) create a requirement for the
persons who are benefitted by said Resolution to disclose the
amounts and dates of the loans and the outstanding balances on
Financial Statements, since the City Mgr and the Finance
Director are Public Officers and as such give advice (and did)
and information and do influence the City County (Legislative
Body) in this decision ?.

There have been no Financial Disclosures made by any person
taking advantage of this program.

Your decision on this matter will be greatly appreciated.

With your permission, may I ask one more question for
definition purposes ?

Does a "Line of Credit" (in excess of $20,000.00) require
reporting on any Financial Statement of a Candidate for
elective office ?

I appreciate your assistance in these matters.


Kenneth C Perkins
1221 Brighton Dr
Fairfield Calif
94533
(707) 425 2419
